sections.paragraph:
fem. (from the root נָגַן).-

(1) music of stringed instruments, Lam 5:14 Isa 38:20.

(2) a stringed instrument, in the titles of Psa 4:1-8, , 54 , 55 , 67 , 76 .

(3) a song, sung to the music of stringed instruments, a psalm, Psa 77:7 specially a song of derision, a satire, Lam 3:14 Job 30:9.
